task: Settlement data model (read side). Schema settlement, tables settlement/settlement_line/settlement_deduction. RLS+NULLIF. 3 read-only GET endpoints. No financial writes. Spine event on detail view.
details: db/migrations/202606120100_c1_pre_settlements.sql: schema settlement, 3 tables, RLS NULLIF, updated_at triggers, no GENERATED columns

apps/backend/src/settlements/pre-settlements.routes.ts: GET /api/v1/settlements (list + 4 metric cards), GET /api/v1/settlements/:id (lines+deductions+spine emit), GET /api/v1/settlements/pending-deductions (driver_finance.escrow_deductions_pending feed)
